config-ios-cli-trans.clis: version 17.15 memory free low-watermark processor 130582 service internal service timestamps debug datetime msec service timestamps log datetime msec service call-home no service dhcp no service tcp-small-servers no service udp-small-servers hostname jcohoe-c9300x-border1-acr-day1 control-plane service-policy input system-cpp-policy ! clock summer-time PDST recurring clock timezone pacific -8 0 login on-success log vtp mode server no errdisable detect cause loopdetect license boot level network-advantage addon dna-advantage license smart transport Off transceiver type all monitoring ! iox boot system switch all flash:packages.conf boot enable-break switch 1 call-home contact-email-addr sch-smart-licensing@cisco.com profile CiscoTAC-1 active destination transport-method http ! ! username admin privilege 15 secret 9 username ro password 0 vrf definition Mgmt-vrf address-family ipv4 exit-address-family ! address-family ipv6 exit-address-family ! ! no ip finger no ip rcmd rcp-enable no ip rcmd rsh-enable ip forward-protocol nd no ip forward-protocol udp no ip ftp passive ip scp server enable ip tcp RST-count 10 RST-window 5000 ip tftp source-interface Vlan311 ip route 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 10.85.134.126 ip ssh source-interface Vlan311 ip ssh bulk-mode 131072 ip http server ip http secure-server ip http client source-interface Vlan311 ip http active-session-modules none ip http secure-active-session-modules none ip http authentication local no ip nbar classification dns classify-by-domain no ip rsvp signalling rate-limit vlan 10,311 exit vlan 101 name UNDERLAY exit ! class-map match-any system-cpp-police-ewlc-control description EWLC Control class-map match-any system-cpp-police-topology-control description Topology control
